raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing this complaint because Citibank has refused to properly investigate an unauthorized charge on my credit card and has closed my dispute without providing any evidence or justification, in violation of the Fair Credit Billing Act ( FCBA ). 

The disputed transaction is : - Merchant : XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX Date : XX/XX/XXXX - Amount : {$100.00} - Card ending : XXXX ( dispute letter references XXXX ) I did not authorize this transaction, did not make any purchase from this merchant, and did not provide my card information to this merchant. I reported the charge to Citibank promptly and followed all required steps in the dispute process. 

Citibank has now sent me a letter dated XX/XX/XXXX, stating : > We have no options available in this dispute because of the reasons provided in our previous correspondence. Any further attempts to resolve this dispute will need to be directed to the merchant We regret we are unable to assist you through the dispute process. 

Citibank has not provided : - Any documentation supporting their decision - Any explanation of how they determined the charge was valid - Any proof that I authorized or benefited from the transaction I never received dved any letter to my home address regarding this dispute or action items. 

They simply closed the dispute and told me to contact the merchant myself, which is not compliant with FCBA requirements. The bank is obligated to conduct a reasonable investigation and provide the evidence used to deny the claim. They have not done so. 

I am requesting that the CFPB require Citibank to : 1. Reopen and properly investigate this dispute under FCBA.

2. Provide all documentation used in their decision, including merchant response, reason codes, and internal notes.

3. Remove the unauthorized charge from my account unless they can provide clear evidence that I authorized it.

I am acting in good faith and simply want the protections the law provides. Citibanks refusal to investigate and their failure to provide evidence is unacceptable and leaves me financially responsible for a charge I did not make. 

Thank you for your assistance.
